content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 The Legal Podcast Network : We're Hiring: Appointment Setter (Freelance, Remote) Anywhere in the World Texas Cold Calling and Lead Generation Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5513/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Austin, Texas <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://www.thelegalpodcastnetwork.com">http://www.thelegalpodcastnetwork.com</a> </p> <p>Let’s keep this simple.</p> <p>We help attorneys become the obvious experts in their market by giving them their own professional podcast.</p> <p>They talk. We handle everything else.</p> <p>We also have one rule that matters: one attorney per practice area per market. No clones. No internal competition. Just clear authority.</p> <p>We’re growing quickly and looking for an Appointment Setter who knows how to start conversations, follow up consistently, and book calls.</p> <p>What You’ll Be Doing</p> <ul class="_296098d5 _3969a26e"> <li>This is a 40-hour-a-week position. No part-time.</li> <li>Reaching out to attorneys (inbound and outbound)</li> <li>Starting conversations and qualifying interest</li> <li>Asking smart questions and handling objections</li> <li>Following up until there’s a clear yes or no</li> <li>Booking calls for our team</li> <li>Keeping leads organized in our CRM and scheduling tools</li> </ul> <p>This Role Is a Good Fit If You</p> <ul class="_296098d5 _3969a26e"> <li>Have experience setting appointments or booking sales calls</li> <li>Are comfortable with outreach and follow-up</li> <li>Can work independently without needing continual supervision</li> <li>Communicate clearly and confidently</li> <li>Are organized and consistent</li> <li>Bonus points if you’ve worked with lawyers or marketing agencies</li> </ul> <p>Why This Role Works</p> <ul class="_296098d5 _3969a26e"> <li>Fully remote</li> <li>1099 contract position</li> <li>Flexible schedule</li> <li>Clear offer and niche audience</li> <li>Real responsibility and trust</li> <li>No corporate fluff or busywork</li> <li>Results matter more than anything else</li> <li>Absolutely NO job stacking. What you do on the evenings and weekends are your business.</li> </ul> <p>Bottom Line</p> <p>If you like outreach, enjoy booking calls, and want a flexible remote role with a smart, growing company, this is worth a look.</p> <ul class="_296098d5 _3969a26e"> <li>Apply if you’re confident, reliable, and ready to do the work</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-legal-podcast-network-we-re-hiring-appointment-setter-freelance-remote">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-legal-podcast-network-we-re-hiring-appointment-setter-freelance-remote</a></p> Wed, 10 Jun 2026 23:00:58 +0000 Fri, 10 Jul 2026 23:00:58 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-legal-podcast-network-we-re-hiring-appointment-setter-freelance-remote https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/the-legal-podcast-network-we-re-hiring-appointment-setter-freelance-remote Revvity: Principal DevOps Engineer – Build, Release and Cloud Automation Anywhere in the World Adobe Photoshop, Cross-Browser Development, Estimating and Cost Forecasting, Computer Vision, InfoSec, DevOps, iOS, Cross-Selling, Deal Closure, and Composition DevOps and Sysadmin Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5512/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> India - Remote<p></p><p><b><span>About Us</span></b></p><p></p><p><span>Revvity is a developer and provider of end-to-end solutions designed to help scientists, researchers, and clinicians solve the world’s greatest health challenges. We pair the enthusiasm of an industry disruptor with the experience of a longtime leader. Our team of 11,000+ colleagues from around the globe are vital to our success and the reason we’re able to push boundaries in pursuit of better human health.</span><span> </span></p><p></p><p>Find your future at Revvity&nbsp;</p><p></p><p><b>Role summary</b></p><p>We are looking for a hands-on Principal DevOps Engineer to lead the design and implementation of our next-generation CI/CD architecture for platform-based product development. This role is focused on software build and release automation, scalable delivery pipelines, infrastructure as code, packaging, deployment, observability and integration of development workflows with IT, CloudOps and security toolchains. Security automation is an important part of the role, but the primary focus is efficient, scalable and reliable software delivery across Windows, Linux, cloud and instrument-hosted environments.</p><p></p><p><b>You will</b></p><ul><li>Lead the design and implementation of modern CI/CD architecture for platform-based software development ac
